bf16_sdpa.label: text-bf16-SDPA
bf16_sdpa.output_text: Jerry Seinfeld is the main character of the sitcom *Seinfeld*, portrayed by Jason Alexander. Jerry is a witty, neurotic, and often self-absorbed New York City man in his late 20s or early 30s. He works as a freelance writer and is known for his dry humor
